fever: Drink fluids and rest. If fever continues for more than two days, visit a doctor.
headache: Take rest and stay hydrated. If pain is severe, consult a doctor.
joint pain: Massage with warm oil and take proper rest.
back pain: Apply warm compress and avoid heavy lifting.
knee pain: Massage with warm oil and do light exercise daily.
cough: Drink warm turmeric milk or honey with warm water.
cold and cough: Take steam inhalation and drink warm fluids.
sore throat: Gargle with warm salt water twice daily.
stomach pain: Drink jeera water or warm ajwain water.
gas problem: Boil ajwain in water and drink it warm.
loose motion: Drink ORS solution and eat banana or rice.
vomiting: Sip small amounts of water and drink ginger tea.
weakness: Drink milk with dates and eat nutritious food.
heat stroke: Move to a cool place and drink plenty of fluids.
dehydration: Drink ORS or lemon water with salt and sugar.
white discharge: Maintain hygiene. If itching or smell continues, consult a doctor.
period pain: Use hot water bag and drink warm ginger tea.
irregular periods: Maintain healthy diet and reduce stress.
missed period: Missed period can be due to stress or hormonal changes.
high blood pressure: Reduce salt intake and walk daily.
diabetes: Eat balanced diet and exercise regularly.
organic fertilizer: Compost and cow dung manure improve soil health naturally.
wheat fertilizer: Use DAP at sowing and urea after 25 to 30 days.
rice fertilizer: Apply nitrogen fertilizer in split doses.
crop rotation: Crop rotation improves soil fertility and reduces pests.
pest control: Use neem oil spray or recommended pesticides.
drip irrigation: Drip irrigation saves water and increases productivity.
soil testing: Soil testing helps in selecting proper fertilizers.
rain forecast: Check local weather updates before planning irrigation.
heat wave advice: Irrigate crops early morning or late evening during heat waves.
cold wave advice: Cover young plants at night to protect from frost.
pm kisan scheme: PM Kisan provides six thousand rupees per year to eligible farmers.
kisan credit card: Kisan Credit Card provides low interest loans to farmers.
government loan for farmers: Farmers can apply for agricultural loans from nearby banks.
start small business: Identify a product needed in your village and start on small scale.
low investment business: You can start tailoring, pickle making, tea stall or vegetable selling.
dairy farming: Maintain clean shelter and proper feed for good milk production.
goat farming: Goat farming requires less investment and gives good returns.
poultry farming: Maintain hygiene and proper ventilation in poultry farm.
tailoring business: Buy a sewing machine and promote your services locally.
pickle business: Prepare pickles hygienically and sell in local market.
tea stall business: Choose a good location and maintain cleanliness.
vegetable shop: Buy fresh vegetables from wholesale market and sell with small profit.
flour mill business: Install small grinding machine and offer grain grinding services.
mushroom farming: Use clean room setup and sell mushrooms to local markets.
self help group: Form a group and start business together with small savings.
mudra loan: Apply under Mudra scheme through bank with simple business plan.
